trigger_type: risk_threshold | budget_overrun | policy_exception | uncertainty_exceeded | approval_required_action | stalled_execution | manual_request
trigger_ref: string | null (optional ref to triggering event)
risk_assessment_ref: string | null (optional ref to risk assessment)
requested_disposition: proceed | proceed_with_constraints | pause_for_review | return_for_rework | reject | escalate_further | null
